name: Tom Yum Goong Hot&sour Shrimp Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Raw shrimp; peeled and deveined
1 Fresh tomato; cut into bite-sized pieces
1 tbsp Thai Nam Prig Pow Paste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash shrimp and drain thoroughly. Put water in a large saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat. Add shrimp and cook for 10-15 minutes, until cooked through.
3. Add remaining ingredients EXCEPT FOR LEMON JUICE AND CORIANDER LEAVES. Simmer on low heat for 8-10 minutes longer.
4. Add lemon juice into the soup.
5. Sprinkle with fresh coriander before serving. Serve with rice.
